llm_result.situation: Low-volume week with revenue at 1,800, down 14% from 2,100. Guardrail skipped the CAC spike rule due to insufficient paid lead history.

group_narratives.revenue: Revenue declined 14% to 1,800 in a low-volume week.

narratives.rev_decline_minor: Net revenue fell to 1,800 from 2,100, a 14% decline in a low-volume week.
